title: Blackboard Course Copy Guide
text: Lecturers may copy teaching materials from a previous Blackboard course into the current course. The lecturer should verify copied links, assessment settings, visibility dates and Grade Centre configuration before releasing the course to students.

title: Blackboard Student Access FAQ
text: Students should access Blackboard through the institutional single sign-on portal. If a student cannot see a course, they should first confirm enrolment status and then contact the course instructor or IT Service Desk.

title: Password Policy 2021
text: Staff passwords must be changed every 90 days. This document is deprecated and replaced by Password Policy 2025.

title: Password Policy 2025
text: Staff passwords do not need scheduled periodic changes unless compromise is suspected or required by a security incident. Multi-factor authentication is required for remote access and privileged systems.

title: Equipment Loan Policy
text: The equipment loan service supports staff work-from-home needs. Notebooks and monitors may be loaned to eligible staff with department approval. Students are not normally eligible for staff equipment loan items.

title: Examination Communication Procedure
text: Announcements about examination postponement must be approved by the Programme Office or Academic Registry before being sent to students. Unapproved mass communication about assessment changes is not permitted.

title: Salary Adjustment Procedure
text: Salary adjustment records and named staff compensation details are restricted HR information. These records may only be accessed by authorised HR officers and designated senior management.

title: Grade Change Procedure
text: A lecturer may request a grade change through the approved workflow. Final approval must follow departmental and registry procedures. Direct modification outside the workflow is not permitted.

title: System Outage Communication Guide
text: For planned or emergency system outages, IT staff should prepare a service notice, confirm the affected services, obtain approval from the service owner and publish through official channels.
